heading: Our Team
paragraph: Global Educational Pathways is family-run, deliberately kept small so every student is a real relationship rather than a file number.
note: Real names filled in except marketing (Australia) — that one is a placeholder dummy name pending the actual name from Mahafuzul, flagged in index.json.

members.name: Sabina Yasmin
members.credential: Qualified Education Agent Counsellor (QEAC), ICEF Academy
members.bio: Sabina leads every student's assessment and application strategy personally, drawing on her QEAC certification and her own experience rebuilding a career after migrating to Australia.

members.name: Mahafuzul Haque
members.education: SSC (Science, Main Math) and HSC (Science, Main Higher Math); currently studying for a Bachelor's in Statistics.
members.background: 5+ years as a Shopify developer (themes & sections).
members.bio: Manages and maintains the Global Educational Pathways website and day-to-day operations, working directly with Sabina to keep information, processes, and student records up to date. His background in statistics and years of hands-on Shopify development mean the site itself is built and maintained by someone who actually understands both data and web development, not outsourced blind.

members.name: Mazedul Haque
members.education: SSC (Arts); currently studying HSC (Vocational, BM Shakha, Main E-Business).
members.bio: First point of contact for prospective students and families — handling incoming messages, emails, and initial queries, and routing students to the right next step. Currently studying E-Business at the HSC level, and learning the ropes of education consultancy under close guidance as part of that growth.

members.name: Placeholder Name (dummy — TODO: replace)
members.bio: Based in Sydney, helps grow awareness of Global Educational Pathways within the Bangladeshi community in Australia and supports outreach from the Australian side of the business.

extendedFamilyNote.heading: A Sydney Family Behind the Scenes
extendedFamilyNote.paragraph: Sabina's husband completed his PhD in Australia and has since settled permanently in Sydney with his own home — giving Global Educational Pathways a genuinely established, long-term presence in the city, not just a temporary office.
